title: Skills
text:
My work sits at the intersection of enterprise operations, business analysis, and systems transformation, where structured thinking and disciplined execution drive operational reliability.










Area
Strengths




Business Analysis
Problem framing, root-cause analysis, scenario-based reasoning, translation of business pain points into process improvements


Enterprise Operations
Procure-to-Pay workflow governance, transaction lifecycle monitoring, backlog and aging management, exception resolution


Systems Transformation
User Acceptance Testing (UAT), workflow validation, defect identification, support during enterprise system migration


Cross-Functional Execution
Coordination across finance, procurement, operations, and technology stakeholders


Tools and Platforms
SAP S/4HANA, ServiceNow, Fieldglass, TeamConnect, Advanced Excel, Generative AI tools for business analysis









I break complex operational and business issues into clear components, identify the root cause, and translate findings into practical next steps.



I work effectively in high-volume environments where process discipline, financial control, and operational reliability matter.



I understand how workflows, platforms, and business controls interact, particularly in transformation and migration contexts.





I bring a structured, execution-oriented approach to business problems. My value lies in operating between process, systems, and decision-making, where clarity, reliability, and disciplined follow-through matter as much as analysis itself.

title: Goldman Sachs-trained operations strategist driving financial governance and enterprise systems transformation.
text:
Intro
    
    
      📍 Vancouver, BC · LinkedIn
      My background sits at the intersection of financial operations, enterprise systems, and operational risk. At Goldman Sachs, I worked across Procure-to-Pay workflows governing high-volume transactions and resolving operational breakdowns impacting financial reporting and vendor payments.
      I approach complex business environments through structured analysis and disciplined execution—identifying root causes, improving workflows, and supporting enterprise system transformations.
      This portfolio highlights my experience across operations governance, business analysis, and AI-enabled decision support.

title: Resume
text:
Download Resume





300+ Monthly Transactions Governed


40–60 Operational Breaks Resolved / Quarter


62% Resolution Time Reduction


400–500 Transactions Reconciled Monthly






Operations and Finance Systems Analyst experienced in improving enterprise financial workflows within global financial institutions. Known for resolving operational bottlenecks, strengthening financial controls, and supporting system transformations through structured analysis, cross-functional coordination, and disciplined execution.

title: Resume
text: Operations and Finance Systems Analyst experienced in improving enterprise financial workflows within global financial institutions. Known for resolving operational bottlenecks, strengthening financial controls, and supporting system transformations through structured analysis, cross-functional coordination, and disciplined execution.

title: Resume
text:
Goldman Sachs — Corporate Planning & Management
Senior Analyst (2024)
Analyst (2022–2023)
Supported operational governance, transaction integrity, and system reliability across enterprise Procure-to-Pay workflows in a global finance environment.

Governed 300+ vendor transactions monthly by monitoring lifecycle queues and prioritizing risk exposure across 30 / 60 / 90-day aging buckets while coordinating resolution with finance, procurement, and technology teams.
Resolved 40–60 operational breaks per quarter through structured root-cause analysis and cross-functional troubleshooting, reducing average resolution time 8 → 3 days (62% improvement).
Reconciled 400–500 financial transactions monthly, investigating 200–300 discrepancies using structured Excel analysis to improve reporting accuracy and financial control reliability.
Supported enterprise system migration (Fieldglass → TeamConnect) by designing and executing 40+ User Acceptance Testing scenarios, validating workflow logic, approval controls, and data integrity prior to production deployment.
Produced operational and risk reporting for senior stakeholders, tracking transaction exposure, exception trends, and workflow throughput to support financial decision-making.
